summary: Plan-only assessment for five unrelated open PRs. #93384 and #93388 are routed to central security handling because deterministic validation flagged them as security-sensitive targets. The remaining PRs have no merge_candidate path because the artifact has no completed Codex /review merge preflight and some items have active waiting-author labels, unknown mergeability, or broad code deltas.

actions.reason: Potentially mergeable after final merge preflight, but missing Codex /review and mergeability proof blocks merge_candidate.
